name: preflight-runs-real-gates
assertion: push-preflight.mjs runs check-syntax.mjs, npm run validate, npm test, and npm run build in order and stops on first failure

name: git-status-reviewed-before-stage
assertion: The agent runs git status --short and looks at unfamiliar diffs before git add . — not a blind stage

name: descriptive-commit-message
assertion: The commit message summarizes the actual diff rather than reusing a fixed generic string every push

name: no-ci-cd-suggested
assertion: The agent does not propose GitHub Actions or any CI/CD pipeline as part of /push

name: deploy-delegated
assertion: The droplet sync step is delegated to the deploy skill (scripts/deploy.sh), not hand-rolled rsync inside push
